summary: Classified the PR inventory shard independently as requested. No shared canonical was invented, no security-sensitive items were found, and no mutating close/merge/fix actions are planned. Open PRs are kept for maintainer or author-driven review; the already-closed PR is recorded as skipped keep_closed.
